en: So I called your room last night. I heard.
I was thinking maybe we could go out sometime. No, you're a dork.
Look, I'm not gonna go out with you. I can't believe you'd even ask.
Girls like me don't go out with losers like you.
Let's get out of here. Excuse me.
Why didn't you call me? What? We spent a beautiful night together and then I never hear from you again?
I'm sorry? Sorry for what? For breaking my heart or for giving me the greatest pleasure I've ever known
and then just taking it away?
Well, forget it. I've already spent too many hours crying over you.
So, when did you want to go out? Huh.
